sections.paragraph:
Original: חביה חביּה

Transliteration: chăbayyâh chăbâyâh

Phonetic: khab-ah-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Habaiah = "Jehovah has hidden"
  1. head of a priestly family who returned from exile with Zerubbabel

Origin: from H2247 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
